mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months following a rate cut, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of instances when the trigger activates, or the signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.03 during periods of stable employment.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in new home sales and housing starts indicate a collapsing housing demand cycle, which reduces construction activity and consumer wealth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns with Rank IC below 0.02, or positive returns occur in >50% of co-declining months.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in the index of industrial production reflect strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO growth coincides with negative 5-day forward returns in >55% of observations, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below baseline during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index annual growth rate surpasses 4.0%, anticipated monetary tightening and eroded real corporate margins force equity repricing, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of months where CPIAUCSL YoY exceeds 4.0%, or the threshold fails to separate return distributions with a p-value above 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor market expansion, boosting consumer confidence and equity valuations for positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of aligned months, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding aggregate demand and corporate revenue fundamentals, which systematically drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDP growth quarters are followed by negative 60-day forward returns in >55% of cases, or the signal Rank IC falls below 0.02 across rolling evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in industrial production exceeding 0.3% signals weakening manufacturing demand and supply chain bottlenecks, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative INDPRO growth fails to predict negative 5-day returns with Rank IC below 0.02, or positive returns occur in >60% of triggered instances.
